This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-wc84-j36w-pw4x. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.5.2 contains an environment variable injection vulnerability where workspace .env STATE_DIRECTORY could influence bundled runtime dependency roots. Attackers can manipulate the STATE_DIRECTORY variable to load runtime dependencies from unintended local paths, potentially executing malicious code during dependency resolution.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4qgr-57jq-93vh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:38:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4qgr-57jq-93vh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4qgr-57jq-93vh"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:03Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:31:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-wc84-j36w-pw4x", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53858", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-arbitrary-runtime-dependency-loading-via-state-directory-environment-variable", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4qgr-57jq-93vh"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Workspace .env STATE_DIRECTORY could influence bundled runtime dependency roots", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:38:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4qgr-57jq-93vh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.5.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:38:43Z"}
